lead_or_expected_configuration: GT40 identity drives every period-correct configuration decision.
critical_identifiers: Chassis plate, tub stampings, restoration records, title, registry trail
label: open
next_action: Photograph all chassis identifiers before cleaning; update vehicle identity worksheet.

lead_or_expected_configuration: GT40 identity, corrosion, prior crash repair, and replica construction change repair strategy.
critical_identifiers: Panel seams, spot welds, material thickness, corrosion points, prior patch panels
label: open
next_action: Create photo map of tub, sills, front bay, rear bay, and suspension pickup areas.

lead_or_expected_configuration: Body configuration affects cooling, brake ducts, tire clearance, and period appearance.
critical_identifiers: Clip construction, hinges, latch hardware, duct openings, repair layers
label: open
next_action: Inspect fit before suspension alignment or aero-sensitive ride-height decisions.

lead_or_expected_configuration: Door and glazing specification varies across Mk I, road, race, and later rebuilds.
critical_identifiers: Door shell type, window frame, latch, hinge, weather seal, roof cutout fit
label: open
next_action: Record as-found adjustment and latch engagement before disassembly.

lead_or_expected_configuration: S015 verifies the 1968 GT40 302 evolution as 101.6 mm bore, 76.2 mm stroke, 4942.16 cc / 302 cu in, with crankshaft part number C8FE-6300-A; installed block/crank are unverified.
critical_identifiers: Casting number, date code, main caps, bore, stroke, crank part, rods, pistons
label: verified_context_installed_open
next_action: Inspect and photograph casting marks; measure only when engine access allows.

lead_or_expected_configuration: S015 verifies a 1968 Ford GT 40 variant for Weslake aluminium cylinder heads, part number 3/3710; S024 adds Gurney-Weslake official context for Mark I-IV development, William Mills GT40 race-head castings, LM8 Aeroplane and Motor road-head castings, later conversions, and rocker-cover substitution risk; installed heads are unverified.
critical_identifiers: Casting marks, foundry marks, serials, material/foundry branch, chambers, valve sizes, port shape, passageway clues, plug angle, rocker-cover details, manifold angle, repair history
label: verified_context_installed_open
next_action: Photograph all marks before cleaning; distinguish William Mills race heads from road-car, Gurney Eagle, rocker-cover-swapped, or later-converted heads before machining.

lead_or_expected_configuration: Valve lash and rev-limit depend on cam card, rocker ratio, and spring package.
critical_identifiers: Cam card, rocker make/ratio, pushrod length, spring installed height, retainer/lock type
label: open
next_action: Measure and record without changing adjusters unless required for safe teardown.

lead_or_expected_configuration: Ignition was freer under Appendix J but actual timing and plug choices are engine-specific.
critical_identifiers: Distributor make/curve, ignition box, coil, plug type, wires, tach drive
label: open
next_action: Lock out setup values until distributor curve and engine build are known.

lead_or_expected_configuration: Weber-style carburetion is a lead only; S018 provides official Weber IDA support, literature categories, and 46/48 IDA gasket/service/master-rebuild kit product-code leads if installed carburetors are verified as IDA; model, choke, and jet stack determine tuning.
critical_identifiers: Carb model, series, serials, choke size, venturis, jets, emulsion tubes, linkage, manifold marks
label: lead_with_verified_support_source
next_action: Photograph carburetor bodies, tags/stamps, jet stack, spacers, gaskets, and linkage before adjustment; record fuel pressure gauge location; use S018 only after carb family is confirmed.

lead_or_expected_configuration: Appendix J treated exhaust as freer than core engine identity, but installed exhaust affects tune and heat risk.
critical_identifiers: Header pattern, material, collector size, mounts, wrap/coating, heat shielding
label: open
next_action: Inspect for cracks and heat exposure to brake, fuel, and electrical systems.

lead_or_expected_configuration: Fuel system safety and event legality depend on installed tank/cell type and date; S015 includes but does not populate fuel-tank capacity.
critical_identifiers: Tank/cell maker, date/certification, foam, filler, cap, vent valves, drains
label: verified_boundary_installed_open
next_action: Map tank isolation, vent route, hose age, and cockpit/firewall separation.

lead_or_expected_configuration: Carburetor fuel pressure and flow are installation-specific and not yet actionable; S015 includes a fuel-pump prompt but does not populate pump type/count.
critical_identifiers: Pump make, regulator, filters, hose spec/date, hardline routing, pressure gauge
label: verified_boundary_installed_open
next_action: Pressure-test only after hose condition and routing are documented.

part_or_area: sump or dry-sump tank pump cooler
lead_or_expected_configuration: Oil quantity and pressure targets depend on wet/dry-sump layout and builder setup; S015 includes but does not populate lubrication type, lubricant capacity, or oil-cooler details.
critical_identifiers: Pump, tank/sump, cooler, thermostat, filter, relief valve, line size, breather/catch tank
label: verified_boundary_installed_open
next_action: Map oil circuit before filling, priming, or setting pressure assumptions.

lead_or_expected_configuration: Cooling setup depends on radiator, pump, fan, cap, thermostat/restrictor, and hose routing; S015 includes but does not populate cooling method, coolant capacity, or fan details.
critical_identifiers: Radiator, pump, fan, cap pressure, thermostat/restrictor, bleed points, hose date
label: verified_boundary_installed_open
next_action: Inspect and pressure-test after documenting hose age and bleed strategy.

lead_or_expected_configuration: Clutch service depends on transaxle input spline, bellhousing, slave, and release geometry.
critical_identifiers: Disc diameter/spline, cover, flywheel, release bearing, slave, master, pedal ratio
label: open
next_action: Identify before pedal adjustment or clutch bleeding assumptions.

lead_or_expected_configuration: S015 verifies base ZF 5-speed recognition and a 1968 evolution for Hewland LG600 5-speed with Ford heavy-duty limited-slip differential part number CDH4204A; S016 provides LG500/LG600 manual context if the installed unit proves to be Hewland LG500/LG600 or directly compatible.
critical_identifiers: Manufacturer plate, model, serial, case marks, ratios, LSD type/part, final drive, cooler/vent
label: verified_context_installed_open
next_action: Identify unit before oil, preload, backlash, or shift-linkage settings.

lead_or_expected_configuration: Halfshaft hardware has high consequence if aged, loose, or heat-damaged.
critical_identifiers: Joint type, fasteners, safety wire, boots, heat shields, plunge, angularity
label: open
next_action: Inspect fastener locking and heat exposure before any powered test.

lead_or_expected_configuration: S015 verifies independent front suspension with coil springs but does not populate stabilizer or shock-absorber details; geometry is not yet known.
critical_identifiers: Pickup points, arm construction, upright marks, spring rates, damper make, bar size, shims
label: verified_boundary_installed_open
next_action: Photograph shim packs and pickup points before disassembly; do not infer damper/bar setup from S015.

part_or_area: arms uprights radius links springs dampers bars
lead_or_expected_configuration: S015 verifies independent rear suspension with coil springs but does not populate stabilizer or shock-absorber details; rear geometry and bump steer are component- and setup-specific.
critical_identifiers: Pickup points, link lengths, upright marks, spring rates, dampers, bar size, shims
label: verified_boundary_installed_open
next_action: Record as-found alignment, shim packs, and hardware before changes; do not infer damper/bar setup from S015.

lead_or_expected_configuration: S015 includes steering type, servo-assistance, and lock-to-lock fields but leaves them blank; steering effort, bump steer, and safety depend on installed rack, column, joints, and wheel retention.
critical_identifiers: Rack make/ratio, column joints, supports, wheel hub, quick release, stops
label: verified_boundary_installed_open
next_action: Inspect joints and stops before rolling-road or track operation; do not infer steering type or ratio from S015.

lead_or_expected_configuration: Appendix J provides a fail-safe baseline; S015 verifies hydraulic operation but does not populate master-cylinder or hydraulic dimension details.
critical_identifiers: Master sizes, balance bar/proportioning, line route, hose dates, fluid, residual valves
label: verified_boundary_installed_open
next_action: Map circuit and verify dual-circuit behavior before bias changes.

lead_or_expected_configuration: S015 does not populate caliper/wheel-cylinder bore, disc diameter/thickness, pad dimensions, or pad count; installed hardware controls bedding and service limits.
critical_identifiers: Caliper make, piston sizes, disc diameter/thickness, pad compound, ducting, hardware
label: verified_boundary_installed_open
next_action: Identify all four corners before bedding, bias, or fluid recommendations.

lead_or_expected_configuration: S015 includes wheel fields but does not populate attachment method or rim dimensions; center-lock torque and handedness are hardware-specific and safety-critical.
critical_identifiers: Wheel make/size/offset, peg drive, hub marks, nut thread direction, retainers
label: verified_boundary_installed_open
next_action: Document left/right threads and hub condition before applying any torque value.

lead_or_expected_configuration: Tire pressure and alignment depend on tire construction, compound, date, and use case.
critical_identifiers: Tire make/model/size, date code, construction, tube status, valve, intended use
label: open
next_action: Record tire data and age; treat aged race tires as unsafe for performance use.

lead_or_expected_configuration: Wiring age and modifications affect fire risk and diagnostic approach; S015 does not provide wiring or protection-device details.
critical_identifiers: Harness layout, fuse/relay map, ground points, connectors, insulation condition
label: verified_boundary_installed_open
next_action: Photograph and draw circuits before energizing unknown wiring.

lead_or_expected_configuration: Battery enclosure and circuit-breaker requirements are safety-critical; S015 includes but does not populate generator or battery details.
critical_identifiers: Battery type/location/enclosure, alternator/generator, starter, master switch, cable routing
label: verified_boundary_installed_open
next_action: Verify isolation and cable protection before connecting battery.

lead_or_expected_configuration: Gauge readings are only useful if sender compatibility and calibration are known; S015 does not provide gauge/sender details.
critical_identifiers: Gauge make/range, sender part, capillary lines, warning lamps, switch labels
label: verified_boundary_installed_open
next_action: Map gauge-to-sender pairs before trusting readings.

lead_or_expected_configuration: Period Appendix J provisions are a floor for research; S019 adds current FIA Appendix K gates for harness standards, extinguisher, ROPS reference, and safety-condition expectations.
critical_identifiers: Belt standard/date/routing/anchor plates, extinguisher/fire-system standard/date/mounting, ROPS/cage, seat mounts, firewall/bulkheads
label: verified_context_installed_open
next_action: Inspect against current FIA Appendix K, event rules, and installed-component documents before competition use.

part_or_area: tank foam filler caps fuel oil brake lines bulkheads catch tanks
lead_or_expected_configuration: S019 adds current FIA Appendix K gates for fuel tank foam or safety tank context, Monza-cap secondary retention, line protection, fireproof bulkheads, and oil catch tanks.
critical_identifiers: Tank/cell type/date/capacity/foam, filler cap secondary device, fuel/oil/brake-line material/routing/protection, bulkhead integrity, catch-tank capacity, breather routing
label: verified_context_installed_open
next_action: Map and photograph the fuel/fire-safety system before filling, pressurizing, or event-readiness claims.

lead_or_expected_configuration: S019 adds current FIA Appendix K gates for battery terminal protection, lithium battery prohibition, cockpit battery cover/fixation, general circuit breaker behavior, and red rear warning light.
critical_identifiers: Battery chemistry/location/cover/hold-down, terminal protection, master switch make/location/marking/shutdown behavior, rear warning light location/output/switch
label: verified_context_installed_open
next_action: Verify battery/master-switch/warning-light compliance before energizing or competition use.
